{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"202603211313127A933769071CE0BECD16\"}"},"total":47},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7602937099426038552","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"细节描述的不错，内容很丰富，连贯"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1770198697,"group_id":"7122390517387627527","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5XUCo1deib28L2zbUTen1iIHuT68Ch5NWNuO2MD38Y/","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3071374191245032","user_name":"喜欢铃铛草的卫卓"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3071374191245032","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7122390517387627527","book_info":{"abstract":"人的大脑就像一把刀子，你越磨砺它，它就越锋利。能让人的大脑达到这一满意效果的就是罪犯和警察之间的博弈游戏。探案是一种高智商的活动，受“道高一尺，魔高一丈”规律制约，游戏的参与者总是在制造更新更绝妙的方法，企图制服对方。书中汇集中外精锐探案故事，精中选精，以新奇、精致、逻辑力强为鲜明特征，言简意赅，妙趣横生，在独飨趣味盎然的推理文字盛宴的同时，既可锻炼读者的观察能力、分析能力、推理能力和创造能力，又可满足读者的好奇之心。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/6f55b18e546d834fe6bef16ffdc15fc6~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"苏会","author_id":"","book_id":"7122390517387627527","book_name":"凶手在身后：我在书里破悬案","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202020","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"11.1万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":751,\"name\":\"悬疑灵异\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=751\u0026name=悬疑灵异\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=2\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_ 品小说\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=970\u0026name=精品小说\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=2\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":165,\"name\":\"悬疑推理\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=165\u0026name=悬疑推理\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=2\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":505,\"name\":\"破案\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=505\u0026name=破案\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=2\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7122391255794846720","read_count":"15631","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"292299"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.5","serial_count":"439","tags":"悬疑灵异,精品小说,悬疑推理,悬疑,推理,破案","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/6f55b18e546d834fe6bef16ffdc15fc6~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779253992\u0026x-signature=VBavAtRIAopXLu7KkjiydeceQYQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"150"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"202603211313127A933769071CE0BECD16\"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":3,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":7867,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":15546,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":1423},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7374047542361506610","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"面对杰克的威胁，她没有惊慌失措，而是冷静地想办法，最终成功制服了逃犯。而且这些故事还能让我在阅读的过程中锻炼思维能力。作者的描写很生动，感觉就像自己在破案一样，很有意思！我觉得这本书很适合喜欢推理的朋友们看。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1716412823,"group_id":"7122390517387627527","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyaLrSNr4dSo+/Dn4cAT9TaswzLJBAJqJ2LuqKUwXevs","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profil
